$script: Gurmukhi (East Punjabi, India) is canonical for v1; Shahmukhi (West Punjabi, Pakistan, RTL) is a separate locale code (`pa-PK`).

common.loading: {TODO: native review — ਲੋਡ ਹੋ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ…}

$cultural_notes.diaspora_audience: Punjabi has a major diaspora audience (UK, Canada, US). Steward should target India-Punjab idiom by default; UK / Canada Punjabi has noticeable code-switching.
$cultural_notes.religious_diversity: Punjabi speakers span Sikh, Hindu, Muslim communities. Avoid religious-specific imagery; default to neutral cultural references per Part 5 §14.
$cultural_notes.Hindi_loanwords: Many tech terms borrowed from Hindi or English; preserve where natural rather than coining new Punjabi terms.
